{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Wanderer's silver-and-gold sword
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Wanderer]] has a silver-and-gold [[sword]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c22">''City of Light'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
